headline: Invesco (IVZ) Stock After 106% One-Year Surge Is There Still Upside Potential
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Invesco's current share price still offers value after a strong run, or if most of the potential upside has already been priced in. The stock last closed at US$28.92, with returns of 5.7% over 7 days, 3.0% over 30 days, 7.3% year to date and 106.0% over the past year. This naturally raises questions about how much risk and reward are now embedded in the price. Recent coverage has focused on how asset managers are responding to shifting investor preferences,...
